plan.caption:
Mewtwo Star from EX Holon Phantoms is worth $7,100. For one card.

It is one of the rarest pulls in the set, and the artwork is why collectors chase it.

Would you keep it or sell it? Tell us below.

pokeev.com runs the live Expected Value on every set, so you know exactly what your pulls are worth.
link in bio -> pokeev.com

brief.cardBody: EX Holon Phantoms's crown jewel.|The card the whole set chases.
brief.craftBody: Mewtwo's pale pink eyes catch the starfield light with an unsettling calm. Masakazu Fukuda painted them to face the viewer directly, no matter the angle.
brief.sceneBody: The gold-star holo Mewtwo hovers weightless against a galaxy backdrop. One of only a handful of copies graded PSA 10 in existence.
brief.oddsBody: Rip a sealed booster and|the odds are 214 to 1.

qa_warnings: slide 1: Cover headline compares card price to 'a luxury watch' which could easily cost more than $7,100 (e.g. Rolex, Patek Philippe), violating the standing rule that comparisons must be to something clearly cheaper than the card

slide 3: Artist description claims Fukuda painted Mewtwo's eyes 'to face the viewer directly, no matter the angle' — this is an unverifiable creative claim that reads as fabricated fact, which is off-brand for a data-credibility tool

vision.subject: Mewtwo Star floating in a cosmic starfield, arms outstretched
vision.hidden: Faint nebula clusters and starburst glints scattered across the deep-space background
